We’ve only got two days until the Democratic Primary, and here’s the deal, Derek: once Tuesday’s primary is over, we will be entering a battle for the soul of Virginia -- and it’s going to be a nail biter.

Analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ were already calling this “the most competitive election of 2021.”

_The Washington Post_ said that Republican nominee Glenn Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office.

And now, _The Los Angeles Times_ is calling the Virginia Governor’s race a “Trump-Biden rematch.”

Derek, Donald Trump’s endorsement of Glenn Youngkin just made what was already an important and competitive race _THE MOST_ important and competitive race in the country.

We already knew our race was make-or-break for the future of Virginia. But with Trump involved and Glenn Youngkin outraising the entire Democratic field, top pundits are saying this is make-or-break for the future of our country.

Cruelty.

**NYT: So far in 2021, Republicans have introduced 144 bills to restrict the ballot initiative processes in 32 states** **[Add your name today: stop attacking voting rights -- let us make our voice heard](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30361668/289300009/387836186?ms=em0606_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NmRiZS1lM2M2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-T8OjvJt7XdIRK0-JY-b-HXB2UZEm6EnfgVt7qGGNY=&emci=cb04e757-7fc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5dd76dbe-e3c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582)** Hi team, Over the past few years we’ve seen radical politicians attack voting rights, making it harder to vote, closing polling places, limiting mail voting during the pandemic, and more. **Now, these politicians are attacking another tenant of our democracy: ballot initiative campaigns, where the people can vote directly on issues.** The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiative campaigns to win real change when politicians refuse to act -- even in deep-red states. But now, they’ve seen our wins and want to change the rules. **They want to silence the people, make it harder to win ballot initiatives, and protect corporate donors over working people.** _We won’t let them get away with it._ **[Add your name today to tell these out-of-touch politicians to stop attacking democracy and ballot initiatives!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30361669/289300010/387836186?ms=em0606_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NmRiZS1lM2M2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-T8OjvJt7XdIRK0-JY-b-HXB2UZEm6EnfgVt7qGGNY=&emci=cb04e757-7fc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5dd76dbe-e3c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582)** | **[Add my name →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30361670/289300011/387836186?ms=em0606_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NmRiZS1lM2M2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-T8OjvJt7XdIRK0-JY-b-HXB2UZEm6EnfgVt7qGGNY=&emci=cb04e757-7fc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5dd76dbe-e3c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582)**

It’s not enough to make it harder for people to vote. They want to limit the things we can vote on.
**They’d rather squash democracy than give people health care or a raise.**
_It’s politics at its worst._
**[If you believe politicians should stop attacking voting rights and democracy, add your name today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30361671/289300012/387836186?ms=em0606_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NmRiZS1lM2M2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-T8OjvJt7XdIRK0-JY-b-HXB2UZEm6EnfgVt7qGGNY=&emci=cb04e757-7fc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5dd76dbe-e3c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582)**

Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Fauci’s 2020 emails reveal the GOP’s corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, It's hard to believe where our nation was one year ago. While many of us are reuniting with loved ones and enjoying life after vaccination, it's easy to forget how cruelly the Trump administration treated science experts just one year ago. The Washington Post has released Dr. Fauci's emails from March and April 2020. Among the chaotic emails from the early days of the pandemic lies a terrifying reality: Republicans knew their president was endangering our country. In April 2020, a senior House Republican emailed Fauci to say, “Keep being a science truth teller.” **This just goes to show that this House GOP “leader” was too afraid to speak up to Trump \-- they allowed the country to descend into chaos instead of standing up to their president.** Peter \-- imagine what would happen if our government's leadership fell into the GOP's hands again. Republicans have been working around the clock since election night to ensure they can gerrymander back the House, and they're suppressing voters to reclaim the Senate. **[We're building pressure nationwide to ensure that spineless GOP officials don't regain power. We still haven't hit our goal of $3,000 to fight back against the GOP's efforts to reclaim Congress. We can't let the GOP continue to erode the foundation of our democracy while refusing to hold their own leaders accountable, and we're counting on you to step up. clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, It's hard to believe where our nation was one year ago. While many of us are reuniting with loved ones and enjoying life after vaccination, it's easy to forget how cruelly the Trump administration treated science experts just one year ago. The Washington Post has released Dr. Fauci's emails from March and April 2020. Among the chaotic emails from the early days of the pandemic lies a terrifying reality: Republicans knew their president was endangering our country. In April 2020, a senior House Republican emailed Fauci to say, “Keep being a science truth teller.” This just goes to show that this House GOP “leader” was too afraid to speak up to Trump \-- they allowed the country to descend into chaos instead of standing up to their president. Peter \-- imagine what would happen if our government's leadership fell into the GOP's hands again. Republicans have been working around the clock since election night to ensure they can gerrymander back the House, and they're suppressing voters to reclaim the Senate. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = We cannot thank you enough for your support in this essential fight. -When Democrats Turn Out = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Not a good week of news for us…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — this has not been a week of good news for our campaign. Let us break things down and then make a quick ask.
**FIRST:** Our first Republican opponent launched a campaign last month to defeat us in 2022.
**THEN:** The Hill named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. This puts a big spotlight on us and means we can’t get comfortable.
**SO NOW:** We really can’t afford to fall short of our goals. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spot an opening and up the attacks on our campaign.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=3&refcode=em210606-1-15?t=1&refcode2=743_6688874_1--0xn&akid=743%2E6688874%2E1--0xn)

clean_body: Friends — this has not been a week of good news for our campaign. Let us break things down and then make a quick ask. FIRST: Our first Republican opponent launched a campaign last month to defeat us in 2022. THEN: The Hill named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. This puts a big spotlight on us and means we can’t get comfortable. SO NOW: We really can’t afford to fall short of our goals. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spot an opening and up the attacks on our campaign. name: Caitlyn for California
subject: Gavin Newsom wants total control
body:
| | _**BREAKING NEWS:**_ _**GAVIN NEWSOM WON'T LIFT CALIFORNIA STATE OF EMERGENCY**_
---
Friend, Gavin Newsom is bad for California. The state of emergency order in California is set to expire on June 15th - a day Californians have been waiting for. But, Gavin Newsom decided he wanted to hold on to his emergency powers for a little longer and is extending restrictions. This has gone too far, Friend. If I was Governor, I would have already lifted restrictions. I would be doing everything in my power to get the people of California back to work and get our kids back in school. We need someone to hold Gavin Newsom accountable, and I am exactly the person to do it. Are you with me? name: Ben Jealous, Civil Rights Leader
subject: needed to break tradition for this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
I’ve reached out to you before and I needed to reach out again with the Virginia primary happening this week. As I said, I rarely endorse in primaries -- but I needed to break tradition for Jennifer Carroll Foy.

Jennifer’s proven track record and her plans for Virginia, rooted in her lived experiences as a working mom and someone who has struggled herself, makes her uniquely qualified to be Virginia's next governor.

**[Her team has 2 days until the primary and they are leaving no stone unturned to win. Contribute now to give their final outreach efforts an extra boost.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-Yk7rfbLNoQ6QnY1iVECW3SOkuad-wjTcNAVUIXHubLpC0M5m8TGzu0D8oZrn0-hueP01R5SFo0oFFxJlmN5yF-WnBLnEzANwzPNJjQr93G5bul49_B86zgZOplhKXLdbhysWDzWnKTBwDjNATzErPlnaxDIctznSvsir3TcPQPbKfr5wogCB6mPsnd8OaxKk0dL9_c8DV_bBJyTp2jD8JaVKhvRmOKdxvVuOcUsX_AAH1nyDR_6-rs7ZurI3i0DKi8n4VpCxbtqP7d5RtXdUI98BIPERL6Q-P7e3yizb6TDlJUJQCBTJ0HjHTQMz2eQM-IxlyhQkAc35ddIpGnS3hJeYzAqalDi7K9lTk4sQy4g/3cj/CXuq7OtJTqKm53zMVYxxRg/h0/dVkY5Ibl1oVM8wJpSXOKTc7Qg_z3Zr1facry2vytg9o)**

As the former President of the NAACP, and current President of People For The American Way, I know from experience that Jennifer is the right leader for Virginia.

As a public defender, Jennifer has seen the two-tiered criminal justice system up close: one that's left Black Americans and other marginalized communities behind, and one that works for the wealthy and well connected. As a leader in the legislature, Jennifer took on tough fights for justice -- and she won.

**[Jennifer is a fresh leader ready to lead the fight for a more just Virginia where no one gets left behind. Will you join me in supporting her? Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-Yk7rfbLNoQ6QnY1iVECW3SOkuad-wjTcNAVUIXHubLp2g89maF2cLiFEYPKARvq0QrzinAdNUlENJXJXuA0IZ-pCZc7MjBQ3aka6p-2Lc6JHoqamjEDZSrDOr70Rj7me31odjt-oWXRw0-6ub8uwxdINs-u3YoOeyj1u70cLBIyeX3qhN8Yjwv4gXpTDxDzU3enOtuOK84nRN3l7wdAL2_ZAD3t3t6Im6TjHtM1ZCX0s8o5HYpG_hgyEZ_-FpEFaN8-sa8lvqM5TtyBUfdVPC_8JZkSth7fIUQ6AB4MKjJhbP3mSxuoDkV6oF_oDwiDk6UgUOXn3ZngRvN6UA-YXHkP0pXnYLl_u6K1keTVimjQ/3cj/CXuq7OtJTqKm53zMVYxxRg/h1/cNJczXyVfcyga4DIbWSno_0Jw-g8sa59WbrhvDahNxk)**

[DONATE NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-Yk7rfbLNoQ6QnY1iVECW3SOkuad-wjTcNAVUIXHubLrkL8AqJCFIeKRgp9BAU_hioO6CL4cvMRTRlY633cSn6GqwIXVJVAu4zcLvLShrVQzuCe1RE0JBhLGc2fmRwB7r9K8oNfbW307kNZwJARzjiuKq5TSH0yIl614O8NnAV1TPdD_axnNDwkwRrT03twqkLb4yELYEgTK1wlwELZtbXB42pvWJvYekA5FaldrV0LSDo9wDKriRenW0upKX2zUvg0lcxzS1fogTCTcIAv-g2lEhj9w9w5RBKGyqG_a3wCXYiY7sDqWLBCIkdkvKpDDW5zAGgpvSfRRhCUDmaC1DPfZ-H8B-GEG_vin7AMMvCVE/3cj/CXuq7OtJTqKm53zMVYxxRg/h2/6hTn-e0-VD7AfJE6wum74FOmuv2rnB79MrU63BkU2m8)
Thank you for your support,

Ben Jealous

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. clean_body: | | | I’ve reached out to you before and I needed to reach out again with the Virginia primary happening this week. As I said, I rarely endorse in primaries -- but I needed to break tradition for Jennifer Carroll Foy. Jennifer’s proven track record and her plans for Virginia, rooted in her lived experiences as a working mom and someone who has struggled herself, makes her uniquely qualified to be Virginia's next governor. As the former President of the NAACP, and current President of People For The American Way, I know from experience that Jennifer is the right leader for Virginia. As a public defender, Jennifer has seen the two-tiered criminal justice system up close: one that's left Black Americans and other marginalized communities behind, and one that works for the wealthy and well connected. As a leader in the legislature, Jennifer took on tough fights for justice -- and she won. Thank you for your support, Ben Jealous Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . name: Ryan Busse, Giffords.org
subject: My name is Ryan Busse and I’m a new Senior Advisor to Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi friend, I wanted to quickly introduce myself. My name is Ryan Busse and I’m a new Senior Advisor to Giffords.
I’ve worked in the gun industry for more than two decades, and I served as an advisor for the United States Senate Sportsmen’s Caucus and the Biden presidential campaign. And I know how critical responsible and safe gun ownership is here in the United States.
Like me, Gabby Giffords is a gun owner who knows that commonsense gun safety laws and the Second Amendment are not in conflict. Together with Gabby and the team at Giffords, we will continue to build a home for responsible gun owners who reject extremism and who understand that our freedoms are coupled with immense responsibility.
The firearms industry and its lobby, especially the NRA, has become dangerously absolutist about the Second Amendment. Today the industry dismisses decency and promotes radicalized views by stoking the same fear, conspiracy, and hatred. It’s gotten so extreme that I wrote a book about it, _Gunfight: My Battle Against the Industry that Radicalized America._ (It’s coming out in October and you can preorder it now!)
Like me, the majority of gun owners no longer feel represented by the radical positions of the NRA and we reject the dangerous politics they fuel.
**If we are going to take on the NRA and create a future where responsible gun ownership and gun safety go hand-in-hand, I’m going to need your help. Which is why I have to ask:**
[**If you are able, can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? I’ll make sure your contribution gets put to work right away in our efforts to stop the NRA from unraveling yearss of progress on gun safety.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21&amount=3&refcode=em210606-1-15?t=1&refcode2=193_3935704_RrdrCC&akid=193%2E3935704%2ERrdrCC)

****
Giffords’ commitment to engaging gun owners in the fight to thoughtfully reduce gun violence in America is so important. I’m working with Giffords to make sure that the NRA does not reverse decades of critical gun safety measures and that universal background checks finally become the law of the land.
Your donation will help us to do our part to stop the NRA from spreading extremism and fuel our efforts to pass commonsense gun safety laws like universal background checks that benefit all Americans — including responsible gun owners.
Thank you for your support.
Ryan Busse
Senior Advisor to Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210606-1-15&t=20&refcode2=193_3935704_RrdrCC&akid=193%2E3935704%2ERrdrCC)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Team Padilla
subject: June is a big month for us
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

June is a big month for us here at Team Padilla. June is an end-of-quarter
month and one of the few times a year we have to publicly report how much
money we’ve raised.

It’s a time when our opponents and special interests will pore over the
data to try to spot any weaknesses in our campaign. So we can’t afford to
come up short.

That’s why this month we are announcing our fundraising goal for June
early and making sure you are one of the first to know.

Our goal for June is to get 10,000 online contributions to our grassroots
campaign. The amount you donate isn’t as important as the donation itself,
because if we can show that tens of thousands of people stand with Alex,
there’s nothing that can stop us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210606-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=65_159979_EoXCoP&akid=65%2E159979%2EEoXCoP ]So what do you say?
Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign?
We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we
receive in June sends a powerful message that we will not back down
without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210606-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=65_159979_EoXCoP&akid=65%2E159979%2EEoXCoP ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210606-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=65_159979_EoXCoP&akid=65%2E159979%2EEoXCoP ]Donate $25

With unlimited resources, history on his side, and the complete backing of the Republican establishment, Youngkin has a clear path to the Governor’s office AND to establishing a foothold for Trump right here in Virginia.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Fire Fauci, Send Him to Jail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fire Fauci now |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4067997dfb&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, one of the reasons I back Gov. DeSantis to the hilt, is how he tells Biden and Fauci to stuff it, when it comes to draconian COVID measures they promote.

Today, we found out that Fauci had been lying the whole time. He had no idea what to do, and his counsel is tainted.

It's time to fire Fauci!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0c668d4f17&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

Have you seen some of these bombshells? He showed political favoritism for Cuomo and against DeSantis:

_An email dated March 19, 2020, revealed more about how the media darling viewed his commentator duties as well as his tattletale style of dealing with state leaders who didn't go along with his "scientific" guidance, providing fodder for Democrats and their media allies to drag DeSantis while turning a blind eye to New York. It's worth noting that Fauci's emails do not contain similar disdain for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo whose mishandling of COVID led to the deaths of nursing home residents.

"Regarding the bars and beaches, I have been screaming on TV 2 to 5 times per night to tell the younger generation to start taking this seriously. I am very surprised that Gov. DeSantis has not completely closed the bars, even if they serve food... I will bring this up at the Task Force meeting tomorrow."_

He lied to people about the effectiveness of masks:

_Townhall also reported on the communications with individuals and media outlets in which Fauci advised against mask wearing for travel, told a medical school dean not to mandate masks, and stated the flimsy masks most Americans were forced to wear were ineffective at stopping the spread of Wuhan coronavirus.

"'Masks are really for infected people to prevent them from spreading infection to people who are not infected rather than protecting uninfected people from acquiring infection,' he said. 'The typical mask you buy in the drug store is not really effective in keeping out virus, which is small enough to pass through the material.' Fauci concluded, saying 'I do not recommend that you wear a mask' to travel by air."_

He also was told the virus was engineered.... but ignored it:

_As Katie reported, Fauci "was told by NIH scientist Kristian Andersen on January 31, 2020, that Wuhan coronavirus looked 'potentially engineered.' In other words, it was manipulated in a lab through gain of function research."

"And yet, that's not what he said publicly as he rejected the possibility of a lab leak in interviews, during testimony to Congress and during official White House Task Force briefings. On April 18, 2020, three months after being told the virus looked engineered, Fauci told reporters at the White House, unequivocally, it didn't come from a lab. Most of the media then reported his remarks as 'debunking' a conspiracy theory."_

This guy lied to us about masks, lied to us about the origin of the virus, and used his position to play political favorites.

_With what we know how, how could we take him seriously? He's the highest paid person in the Federal Government. He must be fired._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=abfbf227bf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I am proud to have backed Gov. DeSantis against this fraud Fauci. We need to stand for freedom. I didn't spend my whole life in service to this country, just to have my freedom taken away by some incompetent bureaucrat.**__

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We need to stand firm and demand Fauci's resignation.**

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the Socialists from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

We need strong leadership now. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b2edabbe8a&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cfe315fb65&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a4f3bd045e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a4dcfa0655&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b869a8f5fc&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=372e6c55e4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=372e6c55e4).

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: 🥁 Drumroll please...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

I just ran the numbers with my finance team and ... 🥁drumroll, please ... we met our extended fundraising goal!

I can't tell you how thrilled I am to share the good news with you. I'll be honest: when we fell short of our end-of-month goal last month, I was disheartened. But this grassroots team stepped up in a big way to make up for it, and I couldn't be more grateful. Thank you.

Now, we've got a heck of a lot of momentum to keep this campaign going strong and take down Ron Johnson once and for all. Winning a race as competitive as ours won't be easy -- nothing worth fighting for ever is -- but reaching an ambitious goal like this proves our incredible grassroots team has what it takes to get the job done.

I'm fired up and ready to get back to work! Thanks to you, my team and I have the resources we need to hit the road and talk to more Wisconsinites across our great state.

Believe me when I say this campaign wouldn't be possible without you.

Let's do this,

Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

CONTRIBUTE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-june-21

If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please contact us here [info@sarahforwisconsin.com] .
PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States

subject: Bait-And-Switch! Newsom to Change the Date of California's Reopening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
body:
Newsom has been facing mounting unpopularity lately as he has gone back on his pledge to reopen California by June 15. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2148b1d498d2/8jt85jsn9d-4929426?e=b8a6795190)

[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=41b2726822&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d8a9333134&e=b8a6795190)
---
# Newsom’s Power Grab and Legalized Bribery
Gavin Newsom has been facing mounting unpopularity lately as he has [**gone back on his pledge to reopen California by June 15**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=db64a376f6&e=b8a6795190). It’s one of the many bait-and-switch moves by career politicians.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f2a25055b0&e=b8a6795190)
As if this power grab wasn’t bad enough, last week, [The Sacramento Bee](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=6851cf16ee&e=b8a6795190) broke a story about multiple companies, such as PG&E, that **lobbied the state while also donating hundreds of thousands of dollars to pay for**[**Newsom’s wife’s salary**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8ce22ff538&e=b8a6795190).
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d03a23f0a0&e=b8a6795190)
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8ff95a00cc&e=b8a6795190)
## Meet the Beast Bus Tour Stops 9 and 10
John wrapped up his [Meet the Beast Bus Tour](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=296964efe5&e=b8a6795190) with stops in **Monterey and Santa Barbara**. Talking with Californians is a constant reminder of the changes needed in this state. There’s a reason over one million people put their name on the line to recall Gavin Newsom. People are tired of the corruption, hypocrisy, and lies from the insider politicians in Sacramento, and Californians have been showing up to offer their support for John.
## Monterey
In Monterey, by Old Fisherman’s Wharf, John addressed **Newsom’s spending spree with taxpayer money in an attempt to distract the voters from the serious issues** facing California under his watch. The voters will not be bought off by special interest dollars and career politician promises.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=7dd8503717&e=b8a6795190)
## Santa Barbara
Standing in front of the Santa Barbara County Courthouse on Thursday, John spoke to the recent scandal in Sacramento. Newsom’s family is making millions off a charity funded by companies doing business with the state is one more example in a long list of reasons why he must be recalled. **As governor, John will crack down on corruption and play by the rules** , not create his own like Newsom.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0edbc55238&e=b8a6795190)
## In Case You Missed It
John joined [**KUSI’s**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e565ff9984&e=b8a6795190)**** Ginger Jeffries to discuss the state of the recall and share his goals as governor.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f2ddd827c5&e=b8a6795190)
## Your Support Will Make the Difference
Thank you to those who came out to show your support on Thursday in Santa Barbara. **The only way we will be able to replace Gavin Newsom and fix this state is through the support of people like you**. Californians understand Gavin Newsom can’t be trusted. The insider corruption and lies uncovered this past week are yet another reminder that we need new leadership. This state needs an outsider who will put the needs of Californians first, not a career politician who prioritizes special interest groups and enriches himself.

---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f7b72f5cd5&e=b8a6795190)
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=6392ffdbc0&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d63bf7034d&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=bfdce8e3bf&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=5695505505&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=137ca153a2&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
## [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1a666fdc7b&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199

Meet the Beast Bus Tour Stops 9 and 10 John wrapped up his with stops in Monterey and Santa Barbara. Talking with Californians is a constant reminder of the changes needed in this state. There’s a reason over one million people put their name on the line to recall Gavin Newsom. People are tired of the corruption, hypocrisy, and lies from the insider politicians in Sacramento, and Californians have been showing up to offer their support for John. Monterey In Monterey, by Old Fisherman’s Wharf, John addressed Newsom’s spending spree with taxpayer money in an attempt to distract the voters from the serious issues facing California under his watch. The voters will not be bought off by special interest dollars and career politician promises. Santa Barbara Standing in front of the Santa Barbara County Courthouse on Thursday, John spoke to the recent scandal in Sacramento. Newsom’s family is making millions off a charity funded by companies doing business with the state is one more example in a long list of reasons why he must be recalled. As governor, John will crack down on corruption and play by the rules , not create his own like Newsom. In Case You Missed It John joined ** Ginger Jeffries to discuss the state of the recall and share his goals as governor. Your Support Will Make the Difference Thank you to those who came out to show your support on Thursday in Santa Barbara. The only way we will be able to replace Gavin Newsom and fix this state is through the support of people like you. Californians understand Gavin Newsom can’t be trusted. The insider corruption and lies uncovered this past week are yet another reminder that we need new leadership. This state needs an outsider who will put the needs of Californians first, not a career politician who prioritizes special interest groups and enriches himself. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- John is a businessman - a self-made political outsider \- with big plans to shake-up Sacramento and cut taxes to save California.As someone who doesn't owe the establishment anything , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.California is out of control thanks to career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you. | | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199 |

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: A Personal Story
body:
A story of racial profiling first hand.
| | | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=1)
---
| Peter, I want to share a personal story with you about a time that I witnessed racial profiling by the police. I was a freshman in high school, my friends and I were going to their house from mine. We weren't old enough to drive, so we walked or ran everywhere we wanted to go in the town we lived in. mind you, two of the three friends I was with were biracial. We were a couple of blocks from their house on this particular evening, and we all decided to race to their home. We reached the corner of where they lived we ran past a police officer. As we got to their house, the police officer pulled up and asked us why we were running; we explained we were racing. Unfortunately, that wasn't the end of it; my other white friend and I were released while our biracial friends were continuing to be questioned. The police officer was fishing to see if he could arrest them for anything, asking if they had warrants, ever been in trouble with the police, and other leading questions. But, of course, he never asked my white friend or me if we had any of those. There was nothing I could do to stop the police officer from questioning them. Eventually, he released them, and we all went inside, and they acted as nothing happened. It is an event in my life that I think about time and time again, and over the last year, it has been something that I have thought about more frequently. My friends had never been in trouble with the law, they wanted to join the military when they graduated, and they did. I thank them for their service and their dedication to protecting a country that doesn't protect them. Our police should not profile anyone, and they should be aware of their bias and work to remedy them. My story isn't unique; it is a story of many people of color each day. We must work together to fix our country, our state, and our cities. It's time we have fresh ideas in the U.S. Senate to push for change and ensure that we end the stories of racial profiling by police. We have the power to change this, we have the power to make a more equitable and equal state, country, and world. **[Help us make a difference by donating $10 today.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzswlPis1bJHJdpbzUKD9d9laV9aXfdBawgSaqSo3TruNGva8jRyQ-PDmr9Jpq3wr2U&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=2)** Nicolaus Sleister
[](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=3)[www.Nick4WA.com](https://www.nick4wa.com?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=4) [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6k0Jm8jDE109S7GZfhKfaXmMV0wRNVYoxdZ8n_Nc9D9t&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=5)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3VOJhhOlfNS34J6bd3r1Y4GA2_ravK9BeRX9PGqMLAf&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=6)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TszGt6HvVAjUBT4DK-5VAnA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_story&n=7) **Our mailing address is:** CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 _Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved._

subject: Manchin won’t end the filibuster

| | Hello Peter, The filibuster is the only thing standing in the way of our Democratic majority and sweeping progressive legislation necessary to improve the quality of life for so many Americans. Joe Manchin promised Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell that he is opposed to ending the filibuster for one reason: Bipartisanship. Joe Manchin had total confidence in the Republican Party's moral compass. However, in a shocking turn of events, Republicans have now successfully filibustered the **BIPARTISAN** investigation into the January 6 **attack on our country's Capitol**. McConnell made his choice clear: When forced between bipartisanship or his party's racist base \-- he chose the latter. Manchin is the current lifeline for the filibuster, and he's close to killing it. If we don't act quickly, we could lose our only chance to rid the Senate of its biggest roadblock. **[Peter, we're stepping up the pressure in Manchin's home state of West Virginia. subject: Mark’s got my vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
When I heard Mark was running again for Attorney General, well... he’s got my vote and I hope he’ll have yours too. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30372812/289338704/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGZhYjA4Yy0xOGM3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M-Tapabet5pesNES-DiREJtyR8-Aa1wK6K8Wfougzg=&emci=60d2724d-e2c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=10fab08c-18c7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186) | Hey, I’m Shannon Taylor - Commonwealth’s Attorney in Henrico County. For two decades, the men who served as Attorney General either ignored civil rights or actively worked to use the law against people in Virginia who didn’t look or think like them. **Then came Mark Herring. He transformed the role into a protector of the people, working to expand our freedoms.** He took on gun violence, racism, and the big corporations polluting our Bay and flooding our communities with opioids. You know, I thought about running for Attorney General myself, because Mark showed us how the office can be a powerful force for good. clean_body: When I heard Mark was running again for Attorney General, well... he’s got my vote and I hope he’ll have yours too. | | Hey, I’m Shannon Taylor - Commonwealth’s Attorney in Henrico County. For two decades, the men who served as Attorney General either ignored civil rights or actively worked to use the law against people in Virginia who didn’t look or think like them. Then came Mark Herring. He transformed the role into a protector of the people, working to expand our freedoms. He took on gun violence, racism, and the big corporations polluting our Bay and flooding our communities with opioids. You know, I thought about running for Attorney General myself, because Mark showed us how the office can be a powerful force for good. But right now, the office is in good hands. name: Team Jayapal
subject: FWD - It's time to choose differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, did you catch Pramila's email from Thursday?
140 million people are poor in the richest nation in the world. Given what we spend on our bloated military budget, Pramila knows that we can end poverty in America once and for all.
And her bold resolution with Rep. Barbara Lee provides a roadmap to do exactly that. [**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Third Reconstruction today so we can show Congress the strength behind our movement to lift our society and our economy from the bottom up.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=1&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=2&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Thu, June 3, 2021
Subject: It’s time to choose differently
Peter, there's no reason why 140 million people should be poor in the richest country on earth.
**Poverty exists because we allow it to exist.** It's time for us to choose differently, which is why I worked with my colleague Rep. Barbara Lee and the Poor People's Campaign to introduce a major congressional resolution on poverty. We're calling it the "Third Reconstruction: Fully addressing poverty and low wages from the bottom up" — because we have the _power_ to end poverty.
[**Will you join our grassroots coalition to end poverty by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Third Reconstruction today? Building the momentum necessary to turn this vision into reality starts with you.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=3&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=4&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)**
Even before the pandemic, more than 2 in 5 people in this country were poor or low-income, just $400 or less away from financial ruin. During the pandemic, it got even worse. By the fall of last year, 8 million additional Americans had been pushed into poverty.
But being poor in this country means more than going without money, a job, or a home, which is why our resolution aims to:
* **Protect our democracy** through expanding our voting rights, comprehensive and just immigration reform, guaranteeing Native and Indigenous rights; addressing the war economy; and guaranteeing adequate incomes and living wages;

* **Prioritize the needs and demands of the 140 million people who are poor or one health care crisis, job loss, storm, or emergency away from economic desperation** , with policies that build up housing, healthcare, welfare, water, and equitable high-quality and diverse public education;

* **Update the poverty measure** to reflect what it takes to secure a decent standard of living today as a new baseline for anti-poverty and social welfare programs;

* **Develop a federal jobs program** that prioritizes poor and low-wealth communities (both urban and rural) to address racial and wealth inequality and build up public infrastructure through socially beneficial and climate-resilient jobs and development; and,

* **Raise resources to invest in these priorities** by redirecting enormous military spending and carceral spending, implementing fair taxation, and using deficit spending.

The American Rescue Plan that we passed brought crucial relief. But just like multiracial coalitions brought about the First Reconstruction after the Civil War and the Second Reconstruction of the civil rights era in the 1960s, our current moment demands action of similarly historic proportions to heal and transform the nation. **We need a Third Reconstruction.**
[**With this resolution as a roadmap to end poverty, we can do what needs to be done and deliver for people across America. Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor today and join us in the fight to lift our society and our economy from the bottom up.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=5&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210606&t=6&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)**
To poor people across America: we see you, and we will eradicate poverty in our country with you.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210606-349-footer&t=7&refcode2=349_420207_A6V7hG&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=8&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=349%2E420207%2EA6V7hG)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Meg Platt
subject: $5 to close the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm personally asking | | |
---
Hi there! I’ve been diving into our fundraising numbers, and I’m worried. Our average contribution from emails like these last quarter was $26.03. But last month, that number went down to $20.64. That may not seem like a big difference, but when enough people give -- or don’t give -- a few dollars, it really adds up. **[You’re one of Senator Hassan’s top supporters, so I’m personally asking: can you please chip in $5 today to close the gap and get us back on name: Josh Weil for US Senate
subject: Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter
body:
Issue: 003 Sunday, June 06, 2021 | Summer has begun! We started this campaign back in December, and from the first weekend in January throug
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=DUAPnbWSXO5aL7yOhJ4W4o5rHAW66_ZHSWMuR6RwWNA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2MyTmRZZWIzZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter
---
| |
---
| | Issue: 003 Sunday, June 06, 2021
---
|
---
| | Summer has begun! We started this campaign back in December, and from the first weekend in January through the middle of March, I spent nearly every night during the week in Zoom meetings with Democratic clubs, caucuses, and committees, and every weekend travelling across the state, visiting more than a dozen counties and holding safe, outdoor meet and greet events. It helped me to raise a little money, get a much better understanding of the diverse needs of Floridians, and build a functioning and diverse campaign team. From there, the next two months were spent working within the campaign to establish organized and consistent fundraising, fleshing out our policy and messaging, and getting our brand kit finalized so we could start putting out a consistent message across social media. The results have been fantastic, and now it's summer, which means back on the road with all of the materials and infrastructure we've developed, bringing our message of hope and progress to one county after another, all across the state.
---
|
---
| | IN REVIEW Despite May being the busiest month of the year for me as a virtual teacher, we managed to get out quite a bit. I had the pleasure of speaking at meetings with fellow Dems in Plant City, Putnam County, and Bradford County. We walked in the Tampa Pride parade with the Hillsborough County LGBTQ Democratic Caucus, and the John Lewis Voter Advancement Day Votercade in Haines Day. I attended the St. Lucie County DEC Memorial Weekend BBQ (their first in-person event in 15 months!), the Eid al-Fitr Celebration at Islamic Center of Orlando, the Rally for a Free Palestine at Lake Eola in Orlando, and the in-person graduation for my virtual school students at the Silver Spurs Arena in Osceola County. Already, in the first days of June, I've had terrific opportunities to speak with the large Muslim community in southwest Orlando, and a wonderful group of Democratic organizers in Palatka. To everyone I had the opportunity to meet with and speak to, thank you! This campaign is about you!
---
| |
---
| | We received some nice media coverage during the month, including being interviewed for a featured article in Floricua, the Progressive, Puerto Rican, Florida News Magazine of The Americano News. Later in the month, I was invited to speak on Critical Race Theory and Gov. DeSantis' repeated "Straw Man" attacks on public education with Turn Florida Blue. If you missed these the first time we shared them, both were great, and I've included them again, below.
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=IJiA6vLnHhXvODD8dc2jlI1eaDdwS--lyVC6cojMWIQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVhbWVyaWNhbm9uZXdzLmNvbS8yMDIxLzA1LzIxL2pvc2gtd2VpbC1ydW5uaW5nLWZvci1zZW5hdGUvIiwiciI6IjU0ZjUxOTRiLWI2ZGMtNGQ0MC1mZDFiLWMwNmI3YThiZGE4ZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)
---
[**This Is Why Josh Weil Is Running to 'Retire Marco Rubio'**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=IJiA6vLnHhXvODD8dc2jlI1eaDdwS--lyVC6cojMWIQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVhbWVyaWNhbm9uZXdzLmNvbS8yMDIxLzA1LzIxL2pvc2gtd2VpbC1ydW5uaW5nLWZvci1zZW5hdGUvIiwiciI6IjU0ZjUxOTRiLWI2ZGMtNGQ0MC1mZDFiLWMwNmI3YThiZGE4ZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9) Josh Weil, who is running for the Florida Senate seat, said he is focused on creating systems that work to help all Americans. Image via Desirée Tapia The first thing Josh Weil -the progressive Democrat running against Marco Rubio for the Florida Senate in 2022-wants you to know about him, is that he is not a career politician looking to maintain the status quo in Washington.
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=7FUaAO9COfp2Hs7AKVxBWGmooWJTgn-sefnfbDnMEVs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9VYzRad0VCWjRGRSIsInIiOiJmYTNiYzk3NS00NzAyLTRlZWEtZjIwYS1hMDBiNDJkYzM0MWIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4OWZiNTU0OS00OTM0LTRjNDktYmQ0Zi00YWVhMmU4NjM4MTYifQ)
---
[**TFB Live! w Joshua Weil, Educator, Candidate for U.S. Senate 06/03/2021**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=7FUaAO9COfp2Hs7AKVxBWGmooWJTgn-sefnfbDnMEVs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9VYzRad0VCWjRGRSIsInIiOiJmYTNiYzk3NS00NzAyLTRlZWEtZjIwYS1hMDBiNDJkYzM0MWIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4OWZiNTU0OS00OTM0LTRjNDktYmQ0Zi00YWVhMmU4NjM4MTYifQ) Get to know Educator and Candidate for U.S. Senate, Joshua Weil.Joshua has been a public school teacher since 2012, with certifications in Exceptional Studen...
---
| | WHAT'S NEXT Looking ahead to the rest of June, I'll be in Flagler Beach on June 9th, Delray Beach on June 12th, we'll have a table at the Juneteenth Celebration in Eatonville on June 19th, we'll be up at Edward Waters College in Jacksonville on June 24th, and splitting time between Tea and Coffee in Tampa and canvassing in St. Pete on June 26th. With all of that leading up to three big days in the Panhandle, from July 2-4th, where we'll be meeting as many people as we can in Escambia, Santa Rosa, Okaloosa, and Walton counties. We've also got events tentatively scheduled for Miami, St. Augustine, Panama City, Sarasota, Immokalee, and the Villages, and will be letting you all know about them once they are locked down. I appreciate you all, and everything you have done for us so far, and everything you are going to do in the months to come. Thank you so much for being a part of this historic campaign, and I can't wait to serve you as your next U.S. Senator!!
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c2NdYeb3d/c?w=JjB0LghmZxk_H1zS1mQcY2nB_z2TuiC-D45z3BQ_BfA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2V2ZW50cy80MDAyNDk4OTc5MzE4NDQiLCJyIjoiOGQ5NjBmNGYtZmYwMy00YjE0LTQzYzYtYjZhYjJjNWMyYTgyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODlmYjU1NDktNDkzNC00YzQ5LWJkNGYtNGFlYTJlODYzODE2In0)
---
| | Before you go, I wanted to share our current ask. It's this simple. If you would rather have me in the Senate instead of Marco Rubio, please donate $5 now. Our goal is $1,000,000 this month. That's 30 days to get this message out to 200,000 of the hundreds of millions of Americans who are ready to #RetireRubio. Forward this email, drop our ActBlue link in your group chat, tell the person sitting next to you... "$5, Right Now, to Retire Rubio!" $1,000,000 coming from a couple hundred thousand is far more powerful than any million Rubio has ever raised through his corporate donors, lobbyists, and Super PACs. We are the people, and together we can win!
---

We walked in the Tampa Pride parade with the Hillsborough County LGBTQ Democratic Caucus, and the John Lewis Voter Advancement Day Votercade in Haines Day. I attended the St. Lucie County DEC Memorial Weekend BBQ (their first in-person event in 15 months!), the Eid al-Fitr Celebration at Islamic Center of Orlando, the Rally for a Free Palestine at Lake Eola in Orlando, and the in-person graduation for my virtual school students at the Silver Spurs Arena in Osceola County. Already, in the first days of June, I've had terrific opportunities to speak with the large Muslim community in southwest Orlando, and a wonderful group of Democratic organizers in Palatka. To everyone I had the opportunity to meet with and speak to, thank you! This campaign is about you! | | | | We received some nice media coverage during the month, including being interviewed for a featured article in Floricua, the Progressive, Puerto Rican, Florida News Magazine of The Americano News. Later in the month, I was invited to speak on Critical Race Theory and Gov. DeSantis' repeated "Straw Man" attacks on public education with Turn Florida Blue. If you missed these the first time we shared them, both were great, and I've included them again, below. | | Josh Weil, who is running for the Florida Senate seat, said he is focused on creating systems that work to help all Americans. Image via Desirée Tapia The first thing Josh Weil -the progressive Democrat running against Marco Rubio for the Florida Senate in 2022-wants you to know about him, is that he is not a career politician looking to maintain the status quo in Washington. | | Get to know Educator and Candidate for U.S. Senate, Joshua Weil.Joshua has been a public school teacher since 2012, with certifications in Exceptional Studen... | | WHAT'S NEXT Looking ahead to the rest of June, I'll be in Flagler Beach on June 9th, Delray Beach on June 12th, we'll have a table at the Juneteenth Celebration in Eatonville on June 19th, we'll be up at Edward Waters College in Jacksonville on June 24th, and splitting time between Tea and Coffee in Tampa and canvassing in St. Pete on June 26th. With all of that leading up to three big days in the Panhandle, from July 2-4th, where we'll be meeting as many people as we can in Escambia, Santa Rosa, Okaloosa, and Walton counties. We've also got events tentatively scheduled for Miami, St. Augustine, Panama City, Sarasota, Immokalee, and the Villages, and will be letting you all know about them once they are locked down. I appreciate you all, and everything you have done for us so far, and everything you are going to do in the months to come. Thank you so much for being a part of this historic campaign, and I can't wait to serve you as your next U.S. Senator!! | | | | Before you go, I wanted to share our current ask. It's this simple. If you would rather have me in the Senate instead of Marco Rubio, please donate $5 now. Our goal is $1,000,000 this month. That's 30 days to get this message out to 200,000 of the hundreds of millions of Americans who are ready to #RetireRubio. Forward this email, drop our ActBlue link in your group chat, tell the person sitting next to you... "$5, Right Now, to Retire Rubio!" $1,000,000 coming from a couple hundred thousand is far more powerful than any million Rubio has ever raised through his corporate donors, lobbyists, and Super PACs. We are the people, and together we can win! | | | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | Share on social | | Created with | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

body:
| | |
Peter, I truly believe Jennifer Carroll Foy can win the primary in 2 days. She’s a once-in-a-lifetime candidate who knows what it's like to struggle to make ends meet, go without healthcare, and raise a family as a working mom.

**[But I also know that it takes a group effort to win a difficult race. That’s why I’m personally asking you to donate now and help Jennifer’s team have the resources to compete in the final stretch.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-Yk7rfbLNoQ6QnY1iVECW3Rx2PUJ4JoDKfxv53or0QT1e9l4s8nPf_7Lba2PifM4s7X5Yb_flSbbYprFhhjPjNKwfo47knzbGpzJuynJl4vygGVkUdhv0fLMrOWAr7cwSeCe_FhjmtH61jJ2z2jQOMMPhCpT3aFkKqU6_PgykDoQkMls_ivEOKohZ4Pn1nxM4DXux5i5-SfVJiK43i2KrMzRJU40nznfw7uzsnIp739ZLmyU9AgFiNVDg3u_kxJiy6_IeypMKI1sNN_fMO_bqCyBPZ5b64ccLhMk-JV8BAWtcha5VwKq9eoYhIYSqVNy8/3cj/7sbFMQY9SEmn2sDjikKgUQ/h0/p8f_-MtKDJ2Pbv-TFzj-SeF0c-DhPhQGWfHhiFkrYFs)**

Jennifer’s proven that the polling is right and that she has upward momentum and the ability to mobilize a diverse coalition of Democratic voters, unlike her opponent. The status quo wasn’t good enough and frankly Virginians deserve more.

Jennifer has put public service first in her life. She has championed the rights of marginalized people and working Virginians as a public defender and public servant in the legislature. She helped expand Medicaid and hasn't taken a dime from Dominion energy, unlike her opponent. She has a plan to move Virginia forward.

**[Polling shows Jennifer has momentum to defy the odds again, win her election, and become the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-Yk7rfbLNoQ6QnY1iVECW3Rx2PUJ4JoDKfxv53or0QT24n2FZnsnwMnDmjgStfckYIrR57JRrqJxinrIJJaUCRdXQ0HQlrfU8DUKfH-Kc5AUllu5cV_wU4DA_VzeGU2Rq08j5VJJCUDJa80Uf_Yu2fmpqO3mGoqpbj2eLPFnpV3BfA8MN5chiI9sbuOqomDSk0Zy1oJdeGYRSvPBmJicYzcQxs706nph25LynzSBFix0n79ZLdHUrdtcqY4rAwxRYbYHRQxNiGFc608umB34GVtoqD9_VvIATXgz4g50FeUpX1mlTsxW69YrAgMSzsjQ2/3cj/7sbFMQY9SEmn2sDjikKgUQ/h2/derwP-8Nz6SEmv8NFpJz5Mdm4MkgwZLTWl9tTXdMpfU)**

Thanks for being in this fight,

Katie Porter

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. body:

| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud Republican, a former cop, first responder, paramedic, and business leader. Most importantly and proudly, I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.

**I have spearheaded a large grassroots movement to undertake “America’s Audit” in Maricopa County, where every day we are uncovering evidence of systemic election fraud in the 2020 election.**

_We are trailblazing a path that will lead to greater scrutiny in key swing states with huge systemic election fraud in 2020, like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Michigan._

**But the fight does not end there. We have a long road ahead of us.**

**Proving there is systemic election fraud is not enough.**

**_We need to oust the fraudsters._**

And that means Republicans taking over key elected offices.

**This is why I am writing you today. [I urgently need your support as I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona where I will personally oversee election integrity in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a552c41f19&e=44b8c466b0)**

And to that end, I have secured a KEY endorsement from a great man and Conservative.

**But more on that later.**

**_I need your support to continue the campaign. We are making tremendous strides in our campaign, but we are being targeted on all sides._**

By Democrats.

By the Fake News Media.

By RINOS who won’t stand up to the Radical Left.

**I need proud patriots like you to join the cause!**

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to fight back against election fraud in Arizona and around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1726218bb0&e=44b8c466b0)

| **Former NYPD Commissioner Bernard Kerik just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State, saying:**

**_“I support Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State. He has the integrity, the backbone, and the technical knowledge to ensure our elections are safe and secure from fraud and interference. He knows the job and he will ensure election integrity.”_**

Bernard Kerik is a great man, who with great experience:
* Bernard Kerik earned 30 medals for excellent, meritorious, and heroic service
* He received the New York City Police Department Medal of Valor
* He was honored by Queen Elizabeth II for his heroic work during and in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks.

**I am proud of this endorsement, as he stood by my side and by President Trump in the immediate aftermath of the election fraud in the stolen 2020 election.**

| **Arizona’s Audit in Maricopa County has been a blessing as the tireless work of countless patriots such as myself, the grassroots movement, and Bernard Kerik have enabled and empowered tremendous success in uncovering systemic election fraud.**

_But Bernard Kerik knows there is a long way to go, and our work is just beginning, which is why he has endorsed me for my run for Secretary of State of Arizona._

**Bernard Kerik knows that I helped start the job, and now I can finish it.** **_“If it wasn’t for Finchem and Borrelli and the hearing they held, this would have been swept under the rug” - Bernard Kerik_**

Friend and Patriots, we are watching history unfold as one of the greatest grassroots movements in history continues to grow – and I am incredibly proud to have Bernard Kerik and Donald Trump on my side.

**Will you join us in our crusade against systemic election fraud to preserve the integrity of our elections?**

[_Join me, Bernard Kerik, Donald Trump, and countless other patriots fighting systemic election fraud by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f63fbcc587&e=44b8c466b0)

**My name is Mark Finchem.**

**_I am used to getting attacked on all sides. That’s what happens when you go up against the Fake News Media and the establishment._**

But someone’s got to do it, and I’m the man for the job.

_I will do whatever it takes to make sure that Arizona’s elections are safe, and that AMERICA’S elections are safe._

**Will you stand with me?**

[_Donate TODAY! Let’s stop election fraud together!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b979a8f84b&e=44b8c466b0)
